violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -In the store room refrigerator butter sticks are in the crisper drawers. Drawers are cracked and broken.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Excessive grease on the vent hood.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Clean plates in the kitchen and on the salad bar not inverted.
